sizing_rule.note: Optimal f determined by testing f values against geometric mean HPR across ±3SD price scenarios weighted by probability P(T,U). Select f that maximizes G(f,T). Applicable to options with mandated exit dates. Specific f value must be calculated per trade based on security-specific parameters.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by testing different f values against the geometric mean HPR across a range of price movements (±3 standard deviations) with associated probabilities, selecting the f that maximizes geometric growth.
